{{CargoRelic
|name=B-Tadpole XL
|class_id=20019
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=Intercept [[Hitmen|Hitman No.16]]
|description=A B-tad in the pond suddenly gained intelligence after absorbing natural spiritual energy. A Demon God promised to endow intelligence to its kind, so it agreed to become a Hitman. Shortly after, the B-tad became a Relic!
|fame=18
|art=29
|fth=16
|civ=12
|tech=15
|ss1=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +2%
|ss2=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +4%
|ss3=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%
|ss4=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%
|ss7=Tadpole Pond B-tad Output +6%<br> (Awakened)
}}
